channel.title: Archives on My New Hugo Project
channel.description: Recent content in Archives on My New Hugo Project

item.title: Kicking Off My Senior Design Project: A Power Electronics Build
item.description: Notes from week one of my capstone project.

item.title: My First Sourdough Loaf That Actually Worked
item.description: Three failed loaves later, I finally got one right.

item.title: Starting a Granny Square Blanket: Color Planning
item.description: The hardest part of any blanket isn’t the stitching, it’s picking the colors.
